name: Logansport Golf Club & Restaurant
about: Logansport Golf Club & Event Center is a historic venue established in 1904, featuring an 18-hole course on Cedar Island along the Wabash River. It combines traditional golf with modern amenities, including Trackman Golf Simulators for indoor play and practice. The facility also offers a newly renovated Bar Lounge and a Banquet Room for events, providing a comprehensive golf and social experience. The club caters to a range of activities, from tournaments and outings to individual practice sessions, supported by top-notch technology and event spaces.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman Golf Simulators for real-time swing analysis
Challenging 18-hole course with scenic river views
Versatile event spaces including a renovated bar lounge and banquet room
Ideal for both practice and competitive play

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar service in the lounge

simulator_hardware.notes: Cutting-edge radar technology providing real-time 3D ball flight and club data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is recommended to bring your own clubs, though rental options may be available. Contact the venue for specific details.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned, but the venue offers on-site dining and bar services.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: An 18-hole simulation typically takes 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Logansport Golf Club is suitable for families, with options for both golfing and events.
